seo.title: Contact | Alfora
seo.description: Contact Alfora to share ideas, suggestions, news or difficulties.

page.title: Contact Alfora
page.description: Thank you for contacting us. This space is designed for you to share news, ideas, suggestions or difficulties related to the platform. Every message helps us care for and improve Alfora so it can remain a useful tool for everyone.

form.title: Write to us
form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us how we can help
form.notice: Your device’s configured email application will open.
